title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
summary: AI-powered security tools are becoming more accessible, potentially changing how crypto developers and institutions approach security. This shift could lower the cost and time required to deploy secure code, making robust security practices harder to ignore.
body:
AI-powered security tools are becoming more affordable and efficient, which could significantly impact the crypto industry's approach to security. Researchers suggest that these advancements might redefine what is considered reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for developers and institutions.

The cost and time required to implement robust security measures are decreasing, making it easier for smaller projects and individual developers to access high-quality security tools. This democratization of security could lead to a more secure crypto ecosystem overall, as even smaller projects can afford to implement best practices.

For everyday users, this means that the crypto applications they interact with could become more secure over time. As AI tools become more widespread, the likelihood of encountering vulnerabilities or exploits in crypto projects may decrease, providing a safer environment for all users.

Developers and institutions should keep an eye on the latest AI security tools and consider integrating them into their workflows. As these tools become more prevalent, they may set new standards for what is expected in terms of security, making it increasingly difficult to ignore their importance in the crypto space. Users can expect to see a rise in the adoption of these tools, leading to a more secure and trustworthy crypto ecosystem.
